title: ReDecoCraft
description: A modpack for deco andfurniture lover while being well optimized
body:
Have you ever felt like that Minecraft was missing furnitures and decorations ? 
If yes, then, this modpack is for you !
This modpack features a ton of new decorations and furnitures mod like the Macaw's lineup, Mr Crayfish, and a lot more. This modpack even features WorldEdit if you want to build in larger scale.
And if you have a crappy PC and you fear lag, dont worry ! This modpack is really well optimized with all of the popular optimization mod like Sodium, ModernFix and EntityCulling
